final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a domestic venture capital roadshow announcing GPT-5.5 launch, featuring speaker Sam Altman.

Style/medium: corporate presentation cover, Chinese VC pitch deck aesthetic, clean professional layout with subtle tech gradient
Composition: centered layout with speaker portrait on right third, bold headline on left, generous whitespace for readability
Subject: speaker Sam Altman in professional attire, confident posture, clean headshot or upper body shot
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient background suggesting AI/data visualization, subtle circuit or neural network motifs, Chinese tech conference atmosphere
Lighting/mood: soft studio lighting on speaker, professional and trustworthy mood
Color palette: deep navy blue as base, electric blue as accent, white for text, subtle gold highlights for premium feel
Text (verbatim): "GPT5.5发布"
Constraints: must work as 16:9 presentation cover; text must be prominent and readable from distance; suitable for Chinese VC audience
Avoid: cluttered layout; cartoonish elements; Western-centric design clichés; overuse of stock photos; generic startup buzzwords
